mapper.select: SELECT role FROM user_family_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND family_id = #{familyId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_family_roles WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND role = 'ADMIN'
mapper.update: UPDATE user_family_roles SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND family_id = #{familyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_family_roles (user_id, family_id, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{familyId}, #{role}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_family_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND family_id = #{familyId}
